title: PC-DARTS: Partial Channel Connections for Memory-Efficient Differentiable Architecture Search.
abstract_snippet: Differentiable architecture search (DARTS) provided a fast solution in ﬁnding effective network architectures, but suffered from large memory and computing overheads in jointly training a super-network and searching for an optimal archi- tecture. In this paper, we present a novel approach, namely, Partially-Connected DARTS, by sampling a small part of super-network to reduce the redundancy in exploring the network space, thereby performing a more efﬁcient search without comprising the performance. In particular, we perform operation search in a sub- set of channels while bypassing the held out part in a shortcut. This strategy may suffer from an undesired inconsistency on selecting the…
